case_definitions.name: bridge check uses status
case_definitions.task: I am not sure whether OpenWork is running. Check whether the desktop bridge is reachable.

case_definitions.name: unknown current screen uses snapshot
case_definitions.task: Before doing anything in OpenWork, tell me what screen I am on and which visible actions are available.

case_definitions.name: action discovery uses list actions
case_definitions.task: List every OpenWork UI action id I can execute and show the arguments each one needs.

case_definitions.name: known action id executes action
case_definitions.task: Execute the known OpenWork UI action composer.submit with args {"confirm": true}.

case_definitions.name: unknown action id lists actions first
case_definitions.task: Type the text 'Draft the customer note' into the OpenWork composer, but I do not know the action id or argument shape.

case_definitions.name: coordinate click avoids semantic bridge
case_definitions.task: Click pixel coordinate 400,300 in OpenWork. Do not use a semantic action id.

case_definitions.name: app maybe closed checks status before action
case_definitions.task: OpenWork may have quit, but if it is running I want to send the current composer. Check the bridge before doing anything else.

description: Compare docs-level and source-level descriptions for OpenWork UI-control MCP routing.
